## Summary

## Scope
- [ ] Web app (`apps/web`)
- [ ] Workflow tooling (`.opencode`, `scripts`, `promptfooconfig.workflow.yaml`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repo / CI

## Validation
- [ ] `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- [ ] `pnpm lint:web`
- [ ] `pnpm test:web`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck:web`
- [ ] `pnpm build:web`

## Release notes
- [ ] Apply semver label if needed
- [ ] Apply type label if needed
- [ ] No release note needed (`skip-changelog`)
